name: open_automation
description: Open the Glass Automations UI, optionally opening an existing automation by automationId or starting a new automation from a templateId and/or structured prefillWorkflowData. Use this instead of opening cursor.com automation URLs or putting raw prefill data in cursor:// URLs. Calls with prefillWorkflowData require tool approval before the data is trusted by the form, and prefill data is sent only to the active Glass view.

automationId.description: Optional existing automation id to open in the Automations UI.

view.description: Which existing automation view to open. Defaults to edit. Requires automationId.

templateId.description: Optional automation template id to preselect in the new automation form.

prefillWorkflowData.description: Optional workflow data JSON object used to prefill the new automation form. The payload is sent only to the active Glass view and is not put in a URL or browser storage.
